text_raw: Hey... Please... Please help me...
text_clean: Hey... Please... Please help me...

text_raw: I don't... I don't have much time left...
text_clean: I don't... I don't have much time left...

text_raw: It was... It was the Sandfang Marauders...

text_raw: I never should have come this way in the first place...

text_raw: I don't think I'll make it... Please let the guild know...

text_raw: I've lost too much blood already...

text_raw: Please, tell everyone at the trading post...

text_raw: Something's not right... Did they get in trouble..?

text_raw: Have you heard anything about my traders?

text_raw: Bloody hell...

text_raw: Blasted bandits!

text_raw: There's no hope. We are all doomed.
text_clean: There's no hope. We are all doomed.

text_raw: I've already lost several of my people to them.
text_clean: I've already lost several of my people to them.

text_raw: This desert isn't safe for anyone.

text_raw: Not until those wolf-riding bastards are gone.

text_raw: Don't tell me the bandits got to them...?

text_raw: Was it you who took care of them?

text_raw: What? Seriously? The ones riding those giant wolves?

text_raw: My word...

text_raw: My patience has brought me to the oasis!
text_clean: My patience has brought me to the oasis!

text_raw: We're finally free from those bandits!

text_raw: I was about to give up on everything.

text_raw: May Atima guide your footsteps.

text_raw: Haven't seen a trace of those bandits lately...
